identity.name: CloudDuka
identity.tagline: Your Retail POS in the Cloud
identity.target_audience: Retail shop owners and shopkeepers in Kenya

layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto md:max-w-2xl lg:max-w-4xl xl:max-w-6xl px-4 md:px-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-6 rounded-full font-medium shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 h-12 px-6 rounded-full font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border-2 border-slate-200 bg-transparent hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 h-12 px-6 rounded-full font-medium

cards.base: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm p-5

inputs.base: h-12 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-950 border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg px-4 text-base

assets.icons: Use lucide-react for all icons. Examples: LayoutDashboard, ShoppingCart, Package, Users, Settings, LogOut, Plus, Minus, Trash2, Search, ChevronRight

instructions_to_main_agent: MOBILE FIRST: Always design for 360px width first. Use 'w-full' and 'flex-col' by default.
TOUCH TARGETS: Ensure all clickable elements are at least 44px height/width.
BOTTOM NAV: Implement a fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile users (Dashboard, POS, Products, More).
OFFLINE INDICATOR: Add a visual indicator when the app is offline (use navigator.onLine).
DATA-TESTID: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links). Format: 'page-section-element'.
SHADCN: Use Shadcn UI components but override styles to match the 'Soft Utility' aesthetic (more rounded, softer borders).
CHARTS: Use 'recharts' for the dashboard. Keep them simple (BarChart, AreaChart). Avoid PieCharts on mobile.
THEME: Default to Light Mode. Use 'slate-50' for app background to avoid harsh white.
STATE: Use 'zustand' for global state (cart, user session).
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic centered layouts. Use left alignment for text.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs (p-4 becomes p-6 or p-8).
Never use pure black (#000000). Use slate-900 or slate-950.
Add micro-interactions: hover states, active states, focus rings.
Use skeleton loaders instead of spinners for data fetching.
